UI_trait_NL_ByakuganDesc: Possesses the Byakugan. Greatly expands perception and field of vision. +5 Foraging search radius, immunity to weather/darkness penalties. Grants canon vision/hearing and empowers Gentle Fist. Sustained Byakugan active state drains chakra over time.
UI_trait_NL_SharinganDesc: Possesses the Sharingan. Evolves through combat: 30%, 60%, and 90% dodge at 1, 100, and 500 kills. Sharingan active state drains chakra over time.
UI_trait_NL_SenjuDesc: Possesses the Senju lineage. Restores endurance over time, heals wounds 25% faster, starts with +100% max chakra cap, and unlocks Wood Release: Binding Roots and Creation Rebirth (both cost chakra).
UI_trait_NL_RinneganDesc: Possesses the Rinnegan. Grants superior perception for foraging and unlocks Deva Path: Shinra Tensei (costs chakra). No passive chakra drain.
UI_trait_NL_UzumakiDesc: Possesses Uzumaki Tenacity. Takes reduced health damage, bleeds very slowly, starts with +70% max chakra cap, and can use Alarm Seals and Sealed Scrolls (both cost chakra).
UI_NL_Ability_Healing_Desc: Heals the most damaged body part at the cost of chakra.
UI_NL_Ability_PhysicalReinforcement_Desc: Temporarily reduces fatigue and restores endurance.
UI_NL_Ability_ChakraFocus_Desc: Focuses chakra to reduce panic and stress.
UI_NL_Ability_Byakugan_Desc: Toggle Byakugan: Greatly expands perception and vision.
UI_NL_Ability_Sharingan_Desc: Toggle Sharingan: Evolve through combat to dodge attacks.
UI_NL_Ability_Kamui_Desc: Phase out of danger for a short time.
UI_NL_Ability_ShinraTensei_Desc: Repel nearby zombies with overwhelming force.
UI_NL_Ability_BindingRoots_Desc: Mokuton: Bind and stagger nearby zombies.
UI_NL_Ability_CreationRebirth_Desc: Rapidly heals wounds at a severe chakra cost.
UI_NL_Error_NotEnoughChakra_ShinraTensei: Not enough chakra for Shinra Tensei
UI_NL_Error_NotEnoughChakra_BindingRoots: Not enough chakra for Binding Roots
UI_NL_Error_NotEnoughChakra_CreationRebi: Too exhausted (low chakra) for Creation Rebirth
UI_NL_Error_NotEnoughChakra_PlaceAlarmSe: Not enough chakra to place Alarm Seal
UI_NL_Error_NotEnoughChakra_StorageSeal: Not enough chakra for Storage Seal
UI_NL_Moodle_Chakra_Low_Desc: Your chakra is low (<30%). Consider meditating.
UI_NL_Moodle_Chakra_Critical_Desc: Your chakra is critical (<10%). Sustained powers will fail soon.
UI_NL_Moodle_Mangekyo_Desc: Mangekyo Sharingan awakened. Kamui is available.
UI_NL_Moodle_KamuiVision_L1_Desc: Kamui has strained your vision. Recovery: 1 in-game hour.
UI_NL_Moodle_KamuiVision_L2_Desc: Repeated Kamui use has damaged your vision. Recovery: 6 in-game hours.
UI_NL_Moodle_KamuiVision_L3_Desc: Kamui overuse has severely damaged your vision. Recovery: 1 full in-game day.
UI_NL_Moodle_KamuiVision_L4_Desc: Kamui overuse has severely damaged your vision. Recovery: 1 full in-game day.
